Solar Group News Investors

Solar Industries signs export contract to deliver Nagastra to Armenia

Press Release · 22 June 2026

Solar Industries India, through its subsidiary Economic Explosives, has signed an export contract to deliver Nagastra-1 loitering munitions to Armenia. The contract, valued at about $45 million, covers an initial batch with deliveries beginning in 2026.

Separately, Solar Group announced it has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with EDGE Group of the UAE to jointly explore ammunition and loitering munition opportunities in the Middle East and Africa.

The company said the Armenia order marks its first major loitering munition export and strengthens its position in the UAV and ammunition segments.
